creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Committer's guide https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/committers-guide/ says that "Main Shell Host" is freefall.FreeBSD.org

I was trying to find a shell host with aarch or powerpc and couldn't find one.

Could you please link the list of available shell hosts with their architectures near the "Main Shell Host" in  https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/committers-guide/ ?


Thanks,
Yuri
